response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, IT architecture, and team leadership across diverse industries and technologies. His background includes technical project management, open-source contributions, and mentorship, aligning well with the Head of Development role. However, his German language proficiency is currently at a basic level, which may impact client-facing responsibilities.
strengths: Proven leadership in software development and team mentorship across multiple companies and projects.
Strong technical expertise in modern architectures, open-source technologies (Linux, Dlang, Node.js), and system design.
Extensive experience in IT consulting, requirements management, and complex system design with a focus on scalability and performance.
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' which may not meet the required C1 minimum for client-facing roles.
Limited explicit experience with UML modeling and reference frameworks, though his general architecture design skills are strong.
Relatively short tenure at some roles (e.g., Re:cinq, Optilyz) may raise questions about long-term commitment.
